obs: Tried roasted chickpeas and veggie sticks with hummus. Planning to switch from dark chocolate chips at desk to nuts and seeds instead for healthier coffee pairing.
Made hummus from scratch for first time: chickpeas, tahini, lemon juice, garlic, olive oil. Came out well; now dipping raw veggies instead of crackers/chips.
Living in new apartment since October 15; 700 sq ft, one-bedroom, open-plan. Modern minimalist style, neutral palette (beige/gray/white). Budget $2,000–$3,000 for decor.
Recently turned 30; wanting to take life more seriously and reflect that in apartment decor.
Completed marathon and triathlon. Planning personalized artwork commission (stylized marathon route) and medal display for new apartment.
Considering fairy lights in swagging pattern on walls. Adding eucalyptus to walls via trellis/planter. Weaving lights through eucalyptus. Adding candles/lanterns to tables for warmth.
Arrived in Tokyo today. Overwhelmed by language barrier and city size. Staying in Shimokitazawa. Exploring restaurants, grocery stores, local shops, cafes.
Used 10% off pasta coupon on 15th; $2 off coffee creamer coupon on 5th; 20% off beauty products coupon on 19th. Interested in meal kit delivery coupons.
Made vegan mac and cheese with cashew-based sauce. Turned out well. Experimenting with oat milk. Planning creamy tomato sauce with penne, roasted cherry tomatoes, zucchini.
Participated in Bike-a-Thon for Cancer Research; team raised $5,000. Inspired to organize own charity event (charity run or fundraising dinner) for education/children's welfare causes.
Experimenting with pronouns and gender-neutral clothing. Interested in dapperQ and The Phluid Project brands. Has round face shape. Looking at fedoras and plaid scarves.
Running 30-minute SMART goal-setting exercise for first-year college students. Created 4-column table and one-year action plan in four segments, accounting for full course load.
Participated in Twitter chat about reducing plastic waste. Interested in metal straws, UV-protecting sunglasses, eco-friendly alternatives.
Caught 22-inch trout with silver spinner bait. Planning Lake Michigan trip for fly fishing (spring). Interested in 2–3 inch Woolly Bugger in white/silver, strip-set technique.
Got metallic threads. Sewing machine serviced today, working like new. Planning celestial stars pattern on white cotton lawn. Considering embroidery on natural linen sundress hem.
Just got back from hunting trip with dad at family cabin in mountains. No deer caught but good time. Planning mid-October trip to same range for whitetail deer.
Playing in doubles tennis tournament at club. Made it to semi-finals. Planning another tournament next month. Working on volley improvements with colleague Rachel.
Red sweater became wardrobe staple; worn 7 times in 3 weeks. Needs new winter coat to complement it. Eyeing North Face parka but waiting for sale.
Using category-based closet organization. Deciding what to keep, donate, sell. Has favorite distressed denim jeans needing hemming. Will wash inside-out, cold water, mild detergent, air-dry.
Using exercise bike regularly: 30 minutes, 3 times per week. Looking for new workout playlists and cycling routes to keep routine interesting.
Started real estate investing via 401K property purchase. Used equity line of credit for 2nd and 3rd properties. Acquired 14 doors and ~$1M portfolio in 3 years.
Introduced to hotel investing via Davonne Reaves mastermind course. Invested in hotel. Part of Nassau Mastermind for hotel/multi-family investing.

Currently warehouse inventory associate. Training in QA software testing, digital marketing knowledge. Transitioning to SaaS SDR/BDR role. LinkedIn tagline: 'Sharp SDR | Leveraging digital channels to generate leads, build relationships, drive revenue growth for SaaS companies.'
Took road trip to Denver from Bay Area few weeks ago. ~1,200 miles, ~18 hours with stops. Visiting sister's family in Denver.
Hiked in Rocky Mountain National Park, ~1.5 hours from sister's house in Denver. Amazing views from top. Also visited Denver Zoo with kids. Tried local craft beer and food scene.
Posted Tsukiji Fish Market on Instagram Story (42 views). Tokyo Tower photo got good engagement on Instagram. Sushi first-time post: 57 likes, 12 comments.
Staying at Hilton Tokyo Shinjuku. Previously stayed at Grand Hyatt Incheon on January 20; had good experience with Korean restaurant. Interested in traditional Japanese breakfast.
Used Hilton Honors loyalty points to book Grand Hyatt DFW room on way back from Chicago. Got upgraded to suite. Used fitness center at Hilton Tokyo Shinjuku during stay.
Watched 'The Crown' Season 4; loved it. Binge-watched 5 episodes one night. Finished latest season in 2 weeks. Using Netflix for 3 years. Fan of royal dramas and period pieces.
Interested in: Victoria, The White Queen, Reign, Spanish Princess, Poldark, Bridgerton. Watched 'Wonder Woman 1984' and 'Soul' with family over holidays.
Re-watched bookmarked TED Talks on climate change and sleep. Interested in talks on AI/machine learning. Interested in learning data science and analytics.
Interested in Coursera Data Science Specialization (Johns Hopkins): 10-course series covering R, statistics, machine learning, big data. Excited about capstone project to demonstrate skills.
Considering Master's in Data Science. Narrowed options: Stanford, Berkeley, Carnegie Mellon. Concerned about cost. Completed undergrad CS from UCLA. Considering taking out loans.
Reaching out to UCLA professors for letters of recommendation. Written 5 personal statement drafts but not satisfied yet.
Sold old iPhone 11 to friend for $400. Got new phone recently. Considering OtterBox Defender Series case for rugged protection. Planning Anker Wireless Charger purchase.

Tracking sleep patterns with mobile app. Noticed more restless nights during full moons. Doing light stretching/yoga before bed; helpful. Avoiding work emails after 9 PM. Aiming for 7–8 hours nightly.

Afraid of failing and not being good enough. Didn't finish 3D motion design video from 2020 course. Learned pipeline skills: idea, moodboard, references, blocking, lighting, materials, compositing. Product manager background.
Playing Wordle. Guesses: apple, zebra, elbow, below, globe, globs, glove. Using feedback (X, O, V) to refine subsequent guesses.

Interviewed Tommy for position. Sent offer letter. Tommy countered asking for salary increase, citing current state school district job with more PTO/benefits. UNG unable to increase salary or compete with state benefits.
Interested in historical dramas: The King's Speech, The Duchess, Elizabeth, Mary Queen of Scots, Young Victoria. Period pieces: Pride and Prejudice, Atonement, Remains of the Day, Howards End.
Planning day with visiting sister. Sister fan of Monet's Water Lilies. Visited City Art Museum few weeks ago with Rachel on Saturday, March 12. Spent 2.5 hours. Captivated by Monet's Water Lilies.
